# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

SMCRoute is a small project, as such we have no possibility to support older
versions.  The only supported version is the latest released on GitHub:

<https://github.com/troglobit/smcroute/releases>

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Two options:

1. Contact the project's maintainer to report and discuss vulnerabilities (slow)
2. Report using [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/troglobit/smcroute/security/advisories)
